description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 1, 2025 at 8:22 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a motor home on Mission Street near Angelo’s Alley.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northeast within the left lane on Mission Street with its left turn signal activated. The Waymo AV was 
preparing to turn left into a parking garage located at 1160 Mission Street, but remained stopped to yield to other vehicles traveling 
southwestbound on Mission Street to enter the parking garage. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a motor home traveling northeastbound 
in the left lane on Mission Street approached the Waymo AV from behind, briefly yielded to a passenger car passing in the adjacent bus 
lane, then began to change lanes to the adjacent bus lane. While attempting to pass the Waymo AV, the left side of the motor home made 
contact with the rear right side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. Waymo became aware of damage to the Waymo AV on September 17th, 2025. 
Print
Clear Form
